post.content: Hi Everyone,\n\nI am currently transitioning from a service-based company to a product-based company. I have been working at my current company for the past two years, where my main responsibilities have involved support and working on a few REST APIs. I would appreciate any guidance on the roadmap for making this switch to a product-based company.
Sure , I\'m also in the same boat. Let\'s connect on LinkedIn and talk about it.https://www.linkedin.com/in/kumpawan/
Commenting for notification(I\'m on the same path too and need guidance)
